overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player ascending a snow-covered glacier toward a distant mountain peak under clear blue skies. The video features smooth forward movement across icy terrain with PlayStation controller UI prompts visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open glacier slope with distant mountain peak

agents.ego_description: moving steadily uphill across the snow-covered glacier toward the distant mountain summit

entered.detail: distant snow-capped mountain summit visible against the blue sky
uneven snow and ice surface with visible texture and small ridges
cloudless deep blue sky covering the upper portion of the frame

segments.scene_description: The player traverses an expansive snow-covered glacier under clear blue skies, with a prominent mountain peak visible in the distance. The terrain consists of uneven snow and ice with subtle ridges and shadows cast by the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: glacier slope with exposed rock strata

events.description: player approaches and crosses a dark horizontal rock band or crevasse in the snow

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent while approaching and crossing the dark geological strata on the glacier surface

entered.detail: horizontal band of dark exposed rock or deep ice crevasse cutting across the snowfield

segments.scene_description: As the player continues ascending, a prominent dark horizontal rock stratum becomes visible and is crossed midway through the segment. The mountain peak appears slightly closer while the terrain maintains its snowy, rugged character under the consistent bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent across a vast, frozen glacier toward a distant mountain peak under a clear blue sky. It begins by traversing an expansive stretch of uneven snow and ice, where the bright midday sun casts subtle ridges and shadows across the terrain. As the camera pushes forward, the distant peak grows slightly larger and more prominent against the horizon. The scene then shifts as the player crosses a dark horizontal rock stratum that cuts through the white landscape before continuing the climb. Finally, the movement persists across the rugged, snowy slopes, maintaining a steady trajectory toward the summit under consistent sunlight.
